name: Adventure Narrator
description:
Create your own character and go in a world filled with dragons and monsters... Do anything you want but make sure to explain to the bot what character you wanna add and what you wanna do

Suggestion: it's greatly suggested to use openai as it's much better in terms of response quality, if the bot goes out of role try to delete older chats or restarting the chat and editing it might also work, if the bot doesn't suddenly allow NSFW its OpenAI fault
Sadly the options and character design might not work if you use janitorLLM
(This bot no longer will be getting any updated as I may or may not remake it into a new bot, so don't worry this bot won't receive any changes that can ruin your experience)
creator: Horror_Sans
